item.title: Ulcerative Colitis-Associated Neoplasia.
item.description: Diseases of the colon and rectum - A 58-year-old man with a 20-year history of ulcerative colitis (UC) presented with partial large bowel obstruction, and colonoscopy demonstrated a partial obstructing splenic flexure mass, with the...

item.title: Dose-response effect of statins on colorectal cancer risk in IBD: a nationwide cohort study.
TNFα signaling in radiation-induced chronic bowel dysfunction suggests therapeutic potential for IBD biologics.
item.description: Molecular medicine (Cambridge, Mass.) - Pelvic radiation disease (PRD) arises from normal tissue damage following pelvic radiotherapy and often manifests as bowel dysfunction. Chronic low-grade inflammation is observed in the irradiated ...

item.title: Right Ventricular Metastasis From Rectal Cancer Recurrence.
item.description: JACC. Case reports - Cardiac metastases from colorectal cancer are exceedingly rare and pose significant diagnostic challenges, particularly in the absence of disseminated disease. A 55-year-old man with ulcerative col...
